full_text:
Chong Fu (Yingbo) 種拂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chong Fu (種拂), styledYingbo, was born in Henan. Served Han as Minister of Ritual. Killed by Li Jue and Guo Si’s troops. Chong Fu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chong Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
